category_sources: Official MHonArc homepage describes MHonArc as a Perl mail-to-HTML converter for HTML mail archiving
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and logo text at https://www.mhonarc.org/
docs_sources: Official homepage support section links to documentation, FAQ, and guides
source_facts.homepage is the official project homepage
repo_sources: Official MHonArc contacts page references a CVS commits list for the MHonArc CVS repository
Official MHonArc-related mharc page says anonymous CVS access is available at savannah.gnu.org/projects/mhonarc
tags_sources: Official MHonArc homepage describes HTML mail archiving with index, thread linking, MIME support, and customization
